headline: What Aflac (AFL)'s Earnings Surge and Dividend Hike Mean For Shareholders
summary: Aflac Incorporated recently reported first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue rising to US$4.35 billion from US$3.40 billion and net income increasing to US$1.02 billion from US$29.00 million a year earlier. Alongside these stronger earnings, Aflac raised its quarterly dividend again and filed a US$5.93 billion common stock shelf registration, underscoring both ongoing shareholder payouts and additional capital-raising flexibility. We’ll now examine how Aflac’s sharply higher quarterly net...
